overall.description: A nighttime journey through open prairie grasslands in a Western-themed video game (Red Dead Redemption 2). The player character rides a horse equipped with a side lantern through rolling hills, then dismounts to lead the horse on foot along a dirt trail, with moonlight illuminating the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with rolling hills on the left

agents.ego_description: riding a horse through the grassland at night, holding the reins as the horse walks along the dirt path illuminated by a hanging lantern

notable_agents.action: horse walking steadily along the trail, its lantern casting a warm yellow light on the grass

entered.detail: dark silhouetted hills forming the left boundary of the valley
large oak trees dotting the left hillside against the night sky
isolated trees visible on the right horizon
narrow dirt path winding through the tall prairie grass
tall dry golden-brown grass covering the open plain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark prairie night with the character riding a horse along a narrow dirt trail. Rolling hills rise on the left while open grassland stretches to the right, all illuminated by the horse's side lantern and pale moonlight. The scene is empty of other people, creating a solitary, atmospheric journey through the wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with distant forest line becoming visible ahead

events.description: character dismounts the horse and begins walking alongside it, leading it by the reins

agents.ego_description: walking beside the horse and leading it along the dirt path, holding the reins while matching the horse's pace

notable_agents.action: horse walking calmly beside the character, maintaining a steady pace on the trail

entered.detail: dark dense tree line visible on the horizon ahead, marking the edge of the prairie

segments.scene_description: After dismounting, the character leads the horse on foot through the continuing grassland. The left hillside draws closer, its trees now more detailed in the lantern light. A distant forest line becomes visible on the horizon ahead, suggesting the path leads toward wooded terrain. The camera follows steadily behind the pair as they traverse the quiet, moonlit prairie.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a solitary prairie night that transitions from a mounted ride to a slow trek on foot. It begins with the character riding a horse along a narrow dirt trail, where the side lantern and pale moonlight illuminate rolling hills to the left and open grasslands to the right. As the character dismounts, the camera maintains its steady follow behind the pair, shifting the perspective to a walking pace through the quiet wilderness. The scene then draws closer to the left hillside, revealing more detailed trees in the lantern light as the open prairie begins to give way to a distant forest line on the horizon.
